metadata.title: create-feature-branch
metadata.description: Create and switch the current checkout to a conventionally named local branch for analysis, design, or implementation work.

command.goal:
Create and switch the current checkout to a conventionally named local branch for analysis, design, or implementation work.
## Usage
/create-feature-branch <issue-or-change|type description> [<base-reference>]
## Accepted Inputs
- An issue/change identifier, or an explicit branch type and description - Optional base reference - Supported branch types: `feat`, `fix`, `docs`, `refactor`, and `chore`
## Owning Agent
@robot-tech-lead
## Associated Capabilities
- Git branch naming and validation - Issue and OpenSpec change traceability - Analysis/design-to-implementation transition

step.step-content: Resolve branch type, identifier, and base reference.
Verify repository default branch and safe working tree.
Create and switch to the conventionally named branch.
Report branch name and base reference.

output-format-list.output-format-item: Confirmation with exact branch name and base reference

safeguards-list.safeguards-item: Do not overwrite, delete, or force-update an existing branch.
Do not push or open a pull request automatically.
